top_signals.title: China-linked actors target more than technology as AI competition with U.S. intensifies
top_signals.summary: Cyberattacks from China-based entities are on the rise and not just targeting specific tech, analysts warn, as the U.S. AI race intensifies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan is raising visa fees by up to 400% for the first time in nearly 50 years. Here's why
top_signals.summary: A single entry visa will climb to 15,000 yen, from the 3,000 yen charged currently, while multiple entry visas will cost 30,000 yen, up from the 6,000 yen now.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump Reports at Least $1.4 Billion in Crypto Earnings
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Iran says it won’t meet with U.S. envoys, clouding prospects for peace deal
top_signals.summary: Tehran also said the two ​sides must still sort out the terms of a ceasefire before addressing topics, such as its nuclear program.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Afghanistan Reckoning
top_signals.summary: Forever wars and the costs of collective forgetting.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: World Bank to phase out China lending - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: World Bank to phase out China lending  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The real AI risk isn’t job losses, it’s who can see what
top_signals.summary: Beyond the fearmongering, it’s a more mundane AI threat that will be making waves in boardrooms, writes Paul Armstrong.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
